title: Boooom!
description: A mod full of laggy tnts and dynamite!
body:
# Go Big or go home with these new tnt!
you cant escape the explosion power! dynamite that breaks blocks, dynamite that breaks the game, dynamite that places blocks! the all you can eat buffet of minecraft tnt! if your friend has these tnt **DON'T WRONG THEM**. The tnt is unescapable. move to the oppisite world border to your friend so when they accedentily touch their precious tnt, your house doesn't explode in the crossfire!
Did i mention that the tnt explodes when:
- You touch it
- when something else touches it
- when redstone powers it

Dont add this to your cherished minecraft world! add it to a dummy world/server!
